mechanism_narrative: Positive momentum in retail sales indicates resilient household demand and supports near-term earnings revisions; higher 3-month growth in RSAFS predicts positive S&P 500 returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: Reject if the RSAFS 3-month growth signal has Rank IC below 0.03 over a 3-year rolling walk-forward window or if positive retail-sales momentum is followed by positive 20-day S&P 500 returns in less than 50% of observations.

mechanism_narrative: A federal funds rate crossing upward from the zero-rate region tightens discount-rate conditions and reduces equity duration support; when FEDFUNDS rises above 1.0%, S&P 500 forward 60-day returns are negative.
candidate_trigger: FEDFUNDS crosses above 1.0% after being below 0.5% in the prior 3 months
regime_hint: early monetary tightening cycle from zero-rate policy
failure_condition: Reject if triggered FEDFUNDS crossings are followed by positive 60-day S&P 500 returns in more than 55% of walk-forward cases or if mean triggered returns are not below unconditional mean returns.

mechanism_narrative: Simultaneous payroll expansion and a falling unemployment rate signal improving labor income without recession stress; PAYEMS growth paired with UNRATE decline predicts positive S&P 500 returns over 20 trading days.
candidate_trigger: PAYEMS 3-month change is positive and UNRATE 3-month change is negative
failure_condition: Reject if the joint PAYEMS-up and UNRATE-down condition produces 20-day S&P 500 returns no higher than unconditional returns, or if the interaction coefficient is not positive in walk-forward tests.

mechanism_narrative: A downside break in industrial production indicates weakening real output and margin pressure; when INDPRO falls below its 6-month moving average, S&P 500 forward 20-day returns are negative.
candidate_trigger: INDPRO crosses below its 6-month moving average
failure_condition: Reject if INDPRO downside crosses are followed by positive 20-day S&P 500 returns in more than 55% of cases or if the triggered mean return is not statistically below the unconditional mean at p < 0.10.

mechanism_narrative: Housing starts above a high activity threshold signal durable construction demand and stronger cyclical earnings; HOUST above 1500 predicts positive S&P 500 returns over the next 60 trading days.
regime_hint: cyclical expansion with firm housing demand
failure_condition: Reject if HOUST-above-1500 episodes have 60-day S&P 500 returns below unconditional returns in walk-forward testing or if the hit rate for positive returns is below 50%.

mechanism_narrative: Rapid CPI acceleration while FEDFUNDS remains near zero signals negative real-rate pressure and future tightening risk; high CPI momentum with FEDFUNDS below 0.5% predicts negative S&P 500 returns over 20 trading days.
candidate_trigger: CPIAUCSL 3-month annualized growth exceeds 4% and FEDFUNDS is below 0.5%
failure_condition: Reject if the CPI-high and FEDFUNDS-low interaction is not associated with lower 20-day S&P 500 returns than either condition alone, or if triggered returns are positive in more than 55% of cases.

mechanism_narrative: A sharp unemployment-rate rise signals deteriorating labor demand and recession risk; when UNRATE rises by at least 0.3 percentage point over 3 months, S&P 500 forward 60-day returns are negative.
candidate_trigger: UNRATE rises by at least 0.3 percentage point over 3 months
failure_condition: Reject if UNRATE-rise triggers are followed by positive 60-day S&P 500 returns in more than 55% of cases or if triggered drawdowns are not larger than unconditional 60-day drawdowns.

mechanism_narrative: Short-term industrial production acceleration signals improving factory output and cyclical revenue breadth; higher 1-month change in INDPRO predicts positive S&P 500 returns over the next 5 trading days.
regime_hint: post-shock recovery or mid-cycle production rebound
failure_condition: Reject if the INDPRO 1-month change signal has Rank IC below 0.02 over any 3-year rolling walk-forward window or if positive INDPRO changes do not produce above-median 5-day S&P 500 returns.
